name: ObbyWikiFooter
description: Designed for Citizen. Replaces the default Citizen footer with a custom footer HTML for the Obby Wiki.
author: [https://obbywiki.com ObbyWiki]
WOU
Wolfite

ObbyWikiFooterLogoSRC.description: URL for the footer logo image. If not set, falls back to $wgLogos['icon'] or $wgLogo.

ObbyWikiFooterLogoWidth.description: Width of the footer logo in px.

ObbyWikiFooterLogoHeight.description: Height of the footer logo in px.

ObbyWikiFooterSiteTitle.description: Site title displayed in the footer. If empty, uses $wgSitename.

ObbyWikiFooterDescription.description: Description text shown below the site title. Can be empty.

ObbyWikiFooterTagline.description: Tagline/disclaimer text shown at the bottom of the footer.

ObbyWikiFooterShowObbyWikiParternship.description: Show the ObbyWiki logo next to the wiki's logo.

ObbyWikiFooterIsInterwikiProject.description: Set to true if this wiki is part of the Obby Interwiki Project or the ObbyWiki Interwiki Project.
